goal: Ensure DeepSeek-native stable-prefix project instructions honor the harness genome instruction-file policy instead of silently reading every generic compatibility instruction file.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: The DeepSeek genome exposes an instruction-file policy, but the rendered stable prefix ignores it and pulls unrelated generic agent instruction files into cache-stable context.
